## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Scrunch AI for AI-powered SEO monitoring and insights.](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Scrunch AI offers comprehensive AI search monitoring, including presence, position, sentiment, and citations across multiple AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [GrowthX seeks a data provider to enhance their SEO offerings for clients, with interest in deeper partnership opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Scrunch AI views monitoring as a commodity and is building additional capabilities on top of their core monitoring platform](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in exploring an API-based partnership with potential for joint marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

## Topics

### Scrunch AI's Offering and Market Position

  - [Started 18 months ago, focusing on AI-powered web search monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Offers enterprise SaaS deals ($50K-$100K/year) and mid-market month-to-month packages ($300-$1000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Monitoring covers GPT, Perplexity, Meta, Claude, and soon Gemini](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Developed a prompt generation platform considering various inputs (e.g., AdWord data, customer interviews)](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Emphasizes persona-based approach for more accurate and relevant monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

### GrowthX's Needs and Market Approach

  - [Serves \~50 customers, offering growth services "on steroids" with AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Seeks comprehensive AI SEO monitoring solution for clients](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Interested in distribution strategies to increase client mentions and citations](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Looking for a partner to provide data and insights, potentially integrating into their own dashboard solution](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

### Data Partnership and API Offering

  - [Scrunch AI provides API access to partners for monitoring data](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Key data points: presence, position, sentiment, and comprehensive citations](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Pricing based on customers and volume of monitored prompts/models](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Open to mutual referral agreements and joint marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Product Demo Highlights

  - [Automatic generation of brand information, personas, and competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Flexible prompt creation and filtering options (e.g., by persona, topic, platform, customer journey stage)](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Detailed analysis of presence, position, sentiment, and citations for each prompt](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

### Future Directions and Differentiation

  - [Scrunch AI building additional capabilities beyond monitoring (e.g., infrastructure for AI crawlers, content creation insights)](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Exploring ways to provide more value through insights and action recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Scrunch AI to provide GrowthX (Kirkland) with 1-week access to the platform for evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Schedule a kickoff meeting with Scrunch AI's customer success team (Will) to set up the trial environment](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Discuss potential API endpoints and data consumption for GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Explore deeper partnership opportunities, including joint webinars, reports, and thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/fFyzYtxhzeTscibg9Qc5PngxYz1HDsex?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
